updates.DISCONTINUATION NOTICE:
Hi everyone,

Thank you so much for staying with me all this time. Whether you've been here since the beginning or joined recently, I truly appreciate every single one of you.

After a lot of thought, I've decided to discontinue Anivexa. Maintaining the site by myself has become too difficult, and I can no longer keep up with everything.

If you're looking for a great alternative, I recommend [Yumezone] (https://yumezone.live) 

Thank you again for all the support, the feedback, and for being part of this journey. Running Anivexa has been an amazing experience because of this community, and I'll always be grateful for it.

Take care, and thank you for everything.
